title: The Landlord Is a Little Girl!
overview: The landlord of a junior high school girl was waiting in a new 1K room with no bath and toilet to start a new life! ?? In addition, a beautiful neighbor also appeared and the expected value of a new life soared.

title: The Landlord Is Domesticated!
overview: With Gukawa JC Chie in a uniform apron and her beautiful neighbor Reiko, we decided to get together in a small 1K kitchen and learn to cook. The height of life! ??

title: The Landlord Is Oblivious?
overview: Chie-chan became scared when she felt the sign of being obsessed with a suspicious person. Reiko can be watched during the day, but she has work at night, so I decided to stay in the room only tonight! ??

title: The Landlord Is Neighborly!
overview: When I get home from work, the smell of curry comes from my room !! I'm fantasizing about living together or newlyweds with Chie-chan, who greets me as a matter of course, but Chie-chan takes care of me like Okan !?

title: The Landlord Likes to be Alone?
overview: Maeda and Reiko plan to have Chie-chan, who hasn't joined the club yet, have a fun school life in order to return straight from school. Chie, who felt that feeling, took the plunge and took action ...

title: The Landlord Is the Center of Attention!
overview: Reiko accepted Chie-chan's request to "make a cute lunch box," but she has hardly cooked. It was a kyaraben that I managed to make, but the result is ...

title: The Landlord Is a Chef!
overview: Chie, who made friends because of Reiko's Kyaraben, decided to create a cooking club. With the cooperation of the people in the shopping district, we started the memorable first day activity, making pork soup.

title: The Landlord Goes to the Public Baths!
overview: Maeda goes to a public bath with Chie-chan. Even though the store has just opened, the men's bath is full of grandpas in the neighborhood. Apparently it was like Chie-chan. When I listened to it, I heard a conversation between Chie and Reiko from the neighbor ...

title: The Landlord Is an Oddball?
overview: Chie enjoys reading the special sale leaflets during breaks. My classmates looked worried, but I was surprised to find out ... Such a mysterious Chie becomes the focus of attention in the class.

title: The Landlord Is Growing?
overview: Mayu and Reiko, who came to the apartment for a study session and saw snow, noticed something wrong with her body. The size of the bra did not match the growing snow ... Chie and Mayu look coldly at the two people who sympathize with each other with big breasts.

title: The Landlord Has a Good Eye!
overview: Maeda and Reiko came to buy plain clothes with Chie, who always wears only uniforms. They choose cute clothes and try them on like a reader model, but the clothes that Chie was interested in were different.

title: The Landlord Is Just So…!
overview: Summer festival. Chie in a yukata meets her friends. I decided to go out with Maeda who was asked to play the role of bodyguard. Chie called out to Maeda, who had become like a venue organizer, protecting Chie who was confused by the crowd from the crowd.
